creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
glarkin     2010-08-30 21:26:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/bzr-externals  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This is a plugin for bzr. Using hooks, this plugin supports external branches
  for the following commands:
  * branch
  * checkout
  * commit
  * pull
  * push
  * update
  
  WWW:    https://launchpad.net/bzr-externals
  
  PR:             ports/150109
  Submitted by:   Carlo Strub
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4026    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/devel/bzr-externals/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/bzr-externals/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/devel/bzr-externals/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/devel/bzr-externals/pkg-plist (new)
